title: lobelia hartlaubii
intro: Lobelia hartlaubii, also known as the Chinese Lobelia or Himalayan Lobelia, is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia hartlaubii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia hartlaubii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and has been used in herbal remedies for centuries.
